title: A Shared World
description: A Vanilla Plus Modpack Designed for First Time Minecraft Players and Veterans to Coexist in the Same World
body:
# 🌍 A Shared World  
*A Vanilla Plus Modpack Designed for First Time Minecraft Players and Veterans to Coexist in the Same World*

---

**Welcome to *A Shared World*,** a carefully curated Vanilla+ experience built to unite players of all skill levels. Whether you're a new adventurer punching your first tree or a redstone veteran building mega-farms, this modpack ensures a smooth, cooperative journey for all.

## 🎯 Key Goals
- **Approachable for newcomers** with quality-of-life improvements, intuitive progression, and no overwhelming systems.
- **Rewarding for veterans** with subtle enhancements, technical expansions, and modded mechanics that respect vanilla gameplay.
- **Multiplayer-friendly** by design—optimized for stability, performance, and balance on shared servers.

---

## 🔧 Core Features
- 🧭 **Exploration Upgrades**: YUNG’s Better Structures, Nature’s Compass, JourneyMap  
- 🔨 **Tech & Storage**: Create, Immersive Engineering, Refined Storage  
- 🎒 **Quality of Life**: Sophisticated Backpacks, Appleskin, Mouse Tweaks  
- 🎮 **Visual & UI Tweaks**: Jade, Not Enough Animations, Better F3  
- 🌿 **Light Immersion**: Falling Leaves, Sound Physics, Complementary Shaders  
- 🏰 **Build-Friendly**: Chisel, Macaw's Furniture, Roofs, Doors, Windows, and Paths

---

## 📚 Sources  
Links to select mod pages for license compliance or attribution:

- **Quark** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)  
- **Quark Oddities** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-oddities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-oddities)  
- **Create** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)  
- **Immersive Engineering** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering)  
- **Refined Storage** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refined-storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refined-storage)  
- **Farmer’s Delight** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)  
- **YUNG's Mods (All)** – [https://www.patreon.com/yungnickyoung](https://www.patreon.com/yungnickyoung) | [https://www.curseforge.com/members/yungnickyoung/projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/yungnickyoung/projects)  
- **Storage Drawers** – [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers)

> *This section includes only mods with licensing or attribution requirements that go beyond standard distribution.*

---

## 🤝 Perfect For
- **Mixed-experience servers** where new and old players play together  
- **Survival-based SMPs** with light automation and enhanced exploration  
- **Vanilla fans** wanting something "just a bit better"

---

> 🎒 *No grindy tech trees. No confusing systems. Just a better Minecraft.*  
> Built for simplicity, depth, and community.
